subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ali! Hearken unto the call of thy faithful Beloved, Who from the Most Glorious Horizon doth proclaim and [3.5s]... ...I swear by the beauty of the Well-Beloved! This is the Mercy that hath encompassed the entire creation, the Day whereon the grace of God hath permeated and pervaded all things
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد قبل علی بشنو ندای محبوب باوفا را که از شطر ابهی ندا میفرماید و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
